zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara於1570年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波時，他的父親Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan31歲，母親Helena Esther Barry21歲。他於大約1570年與Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor在愛爾蘭結婚。他去世於1616年8月31日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara于1570年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波时，他的父亲Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan31岁，母亲Helena Esther Barry21岁。他于大约1570年与Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor在爱尔兰结婚。他去世于1616年8月31日在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

variants.name: Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

nameMeanings.name: Beara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Beer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erhard, Hans, Heinz, Aloys, Bodo, Erna, Ernst, Frieda, Friedhelm, Hanni.

English (West Country): habitational name from any of the forty or so places in southwestern England called Beer(e) or Bear(e). Most of these derive their names from the West Saxon dative case, beara, of Old English bearu ‘grove, wood’ (the standard Old English dative bearwe being preserved in Barrow ). In some cases the surname may be topographic in origin, from atte beare ‘at the grove’. Some may be from Middle English bere ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English bǣr). Compare Bear 1.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara was born in 1570, in Dunboy, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan, was 31 and his mother, Helena Esther Barry, was 21. He married Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor about 1570, in Ireland. He died on 31 August 1616, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara est né en 1570, à Dunboy, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Helena Esther Barry, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor environ 1570, à Irlande. Il est décédé le 31 août 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara 1570 in Dunboy, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan 31 und seine Mutter Helena Esther Barry 21. Er hat um 1570 in Irland Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor geheiratet. Er starb am 31. August 1616 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara è nato il nel 1570 nel Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Helena Esther Barry, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor circa 1570, nel Irlanda. Morì il 31 agosto 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Owen O'Sullivan Bearaが1570年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクダンボイで生まれた時，父Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivanは31歳，母Helena Esther Barryは21歳であった。約1570年にアイルランドでHelena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnorと結婚した。彼は1616年8月31日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara(이)가 1570년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena Esther Barry(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1570년 아일랜드에서 Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1616년 8월 31일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara nasceu em 1570, em Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Helena Esther Barry, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor aproximadamente 1570, em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara родился в 1570 г. в местности дунбои, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Helena Esther Barry, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor около 1570 г. в местности Ирландия. Он умер 31 августа 1616 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Owen O'Sullivan Beara nació en 1570, en Dunboy, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Helena Esther Barry, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Helena Butler of Palstown Lady O'Sullivan of Dunboy 'hibnor aproximadamente 1570, en Irlanda. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1616, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
